general.name: Managed Login Items - Notifications
general.description: Suppresses notifications for managed login items
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>9C1EDCAF-D894-4126-BFCB-F14969567E54</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>9C1EDCAF-D894-4126-BFCB-F14969567E54</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Managed Login Items - Notifications</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Suppresses notifications for managed login items</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Notifications Payload</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>705457AA-5FD1-41DD-BFEE-EB42E7BE6C45</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.notificationsettings</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>9F99A0EC-6DA7-4C12-953A-EB375C3EE229</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>NotificationSettings</key><array><dict><key>BundleIdentifier</key><string>com.apple.btmnotificationagent</string><key>CriticalAlertEnabled</key><false/><key>NotificationsEnabled</key><false/></dict></array></dict></array></dict></plist>
